message:
refactor: concurrent agent improvements to channels and unix sockets

Updates from concurrent agent development work:
- channel/broadcast.rs: Improvements to broadcast channel
- channel/mpsc.rs: Additional mpsc channel refinements
- lab/runtime.rs: Runtime improvements
- net/unix/listener.rs: Unix listener enhancements
- net/unix/stream.rs: Unix stream enhancements
- Test updates for channel conformance and stream e2e

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
